content.problemStatement:
Sardar Singh has many men fighting for him, and he would like to calculate the power of each of them to better plan for his fight against Ramadhir.

The power of a string SSS of lowercase English alphabets is defined to be

вҲ‘i=1вҲЈSвҲЈiвӢ…ord(Si)\sum_{i = 1}^{|S|} i\cdot ord(S_i)i=1вҲ‘вҲЈSвҲЈвҖӢiвӢ…ord(SiвҖӢ)where ord(Si)ord(S_i)ord(SiвҖӢ) is the position of SiS_iSiвҖӢ in the alphabet, i.e, ord(вҖІaвҖІ)=1,ord(вҖІbвҖІ)=2,вҖҰ,ord(вҖІzвҖІ)=26ord('a') = 1, ord('b') = 2, \dots, ord('z') = 26ord(вҖІaвҖІ)=1,ord(вҖІbвҖІ)=2,вҖҰ,ord(вҖІzвҖІ)=26.

Each of Sardar Singh's men has a name consisting of lowercase English alphabets. The power of a man is defined to be the maximum power over all possible rearrangements of this string.

Find the power of each of Sardar Singh's men.


Input Format

The first line of input contains an integer TTT, denoting the total number of Sardar Singh's men.
Each of the next TTT lines contains a single string SiS_{i}SiвҖӢ, the name of Sardar Singh's iii-th man.


Output Format

Output TTT lines, each containing a single integer. The iii-th of these lines should have the power of the iii-th of Sardar Singh's men.
constraints: SiS_iSiвҖӢ consists of lowercase english alphabets only.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
The rearrangement with maximum power is aafilzaafilzaafilz. Its power can be calculated as
1вӢ…ord(вҖІaвҖІ)+2вӢ…ord(вҖІaвҖІ)+3вӢ…ord(вҖІfвҖІ)+4вӢ…ord(вҖІiвҖІ)+5вӢ…ord(вҖІlвҖІ)+6вӢ…ord(вҖІzвҖІ)1\cdot ord('a') + 2\cdot ord('a') + 3\cdot ord('f') + 4\cdot ord('i') + 5\cdot ord('l') + 6\cdot ord('z')1вӢ…ord(вҖІaвҖІ)+2вӢ…ord(вҖІaвҖІ)+3вӢ…ord(вҖІfвҖІ)+4вӢ…ord(вҖІiвҖІ)+5вӢ…ord(вҖІlвҖІ)+6вӢ…ord(вҖІzвҖІ)
which equals 273273273.
It can be verified that no rearrangement gives a larger power.
